description:
#vlog #dayinthelife #digitaldiary #summer #italy #lusdiaries 

i'm back in italy! this past week was so lovely, and i had the best time. 
i hope you enjoyed the vlog, and i’ll see you soon with a new one!
love, lu 💌


i had such a fun time filming & editing this,
thank you so much for being here !!!
